creator: galen.sampson@gmail.com
text:
Tom Russo wrote:
> I was bitten by this today when I foolishly did a mass update on a machine
> that requires NVIDIA 96xx drivers, only to find that now I can't start the
> X server with the accelerated GL anymore.
>
> Nosing around on the NVIDIA FreeBSD forums
> (http://www.nvnews.net/vbulletin/showthread.php?s=0d3c319ae84965e2c3ab00850c3e6e0b&t=127015)
> I find that on 27 January 2009 they released a beta 96.43.10 driver for FreeBSD.
>
>
>   
Thank you for the research.  I will try it out.
